LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-28-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. ON JANUARY 16, 2024. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL REAL PROPERTY AND LANDLORD/TENANT CASES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS IN SUPPORT OF AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE AND DEPARTMENT NO LATER THAN JANUARY 4, 2024. REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LLC DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND BASED ON UNCERTAINTY. PLAINTIFFS SHALL HAVE 60 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT WRITTEN IN CLEAR AND CONCISE LANGUAGE SPECIFYING WHO THE PLAINTIFFS ARE; WHO EACH OF THE DEFENDANTS ARE; THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN EACH DEFENDANT AND EACH PLAINTIFF; CLEARLY LABELING WHICH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE ASSERTED BY EACH PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST EACH DEFENDANT; CLEARLY INDICATING WHICH FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS SUPPORT WHICH CAUSE OF ACTION. THE COURT NOTES THAT THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT REFERENCES EXHIBITS THAT ARE NOT ATTACHED, RENDERING THE PLEADING UNCERTAIN. THE COURT FURTHER NOTES THAT PURPORTED FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS IN SUPPORT OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION ASSERTED IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT APPEAR AFTER THE SIGNATURE AND PRAYER. THE COURT FINALLY NOTES THAT THE PRAYER ONLY REFERENCES ONE "PLAINTIFF" IN THE SINGULAR AND REFERS TO THE "PLAINTIFF" AS "HER." PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Off Calendar Mar-07-2025 Continued To Mar-25-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ashley Smith for Fillmore Center Associates LLC and Greystar California, Inc., Defendants (via Zoom).

Ms. Smith contested the court's tentative decision. Ms. Smith acknowledged a typo in the proof of service of the instant motion. She reported that she has since submitted for filing a revised proof of service reflecting the correct date of service. Counsel and the court agreed to continue the matter and Ms. Smith was directed to give notice to the plaintiff of the new hearing date. The court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LLC AND GREYSTAR CALIFORNIA, INC.'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DISMISSING THIS ACTION FOLLOWING PLAINTIFFS' FAILURE TO AMEND is continued to March 25, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. in Department 501. Defendants shall give notice of the new hearing date.

Off Calendar May-02-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LLC DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend based on uncertainty. Plaintiffs shall have 60 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint written in clear and concise language specifying who the Plaintiffs are; who each of the defendants are; the relationship between each defendant and each plaintiff; clearly labeling which causes of action are asserted by each Plaintiff and against each defendant; clearly indicating which factual allegations support which cause of action. The Court notes that the First Amended Complaint references exhibits that are not attached, rendering the pleading uncertain. The Court further notes that purported factual allegations in support of the causes of action asserted in the First Amended Complaint appear AFTER the signature and prayer. The Court finally notes that the Prayer only references one "plaintiff" in the singular and refers to the "plaintiff" as "her."

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
